stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The typical weather conditions expected around Darwin during July are:

options.a: NE monsoon - continuous heavy rain but little thunderstorm activity.
options.b: Mainly clear skies - advection fog drifting inland with the typical NE wind.
options.c: NW monsoon - very wet - proximity of the ITCZ causes widespread thunderstorm activity.
options.d: Dry season - mainly SE winds - visibility reduced by dust and haze.
